claim: Workspace architecture enforces security through privileged access boundaries: LLM cannot directly access credentials, only through CLI interface
actionable: When building agent data access systems, isolate credentials from LLM context; enforce access through a privileged API layer similar to OS-level boundaries
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Aman Singla & Aseem Chandra: MarcoPolo, A Workspace for AI to Work with Your Data

claim: Single abstraction layer CLI with verbs (list, query, describe, browse, upload, download) reduces agent context bloat when accessing 50+ data sources
actionable: When building agent data interfaces, design a unified CLI with consistent verbs across diverse backends to reduce context overhead and improve generalization
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Aman Singla & Aseem Chandra: MarcoPolo, A Workspace for AI to Work with Your Data

claim: Schema-on-connect solves cold start problem by loading schema and docs when connecting to data source, enabling immediate contextual awareness
actionable: When integrating agents with databases or APIs, load schema/documentation on connection to provide context for query generation without requiring user guidance
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Aman Singla & Aseem Chandra: MarcoPolo, A Workspace for AI to Work with Your Data

claim: Persistent workspace queries create aggregated knowledge base; new workspace can warm-start by reusing learned queries from previous work
actionable: Design agent systems with persistent query logs; use successful historical queries to prime new agents working on similar problems
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Aman Singla & Aseem Chandra: MarcoPolo, A Workspace for AI to Work with Your Data

claim: Workspace architecture enables agents to write reusable shell scripts for reproducible analytics; output becomes shareable dashboard with live query refresh
actionable: Build agent systems with persistent filesystem; allow agents to create shell scripts and React dashboards that tie to live data queries for reproducibility
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Aman Singla & Aseem Chandra: MarcoPolo, A Workspace for AI to Work with Your Data

claim: DuckDB as on-device query engine allows agent to join data across multiple SaaS systems without pulling full datasets into context
actionable: When building multi-system agents, use local database (DuckDB) to perform joins and aggregations, reducing context bloat from large result sets
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Aman Singla & Aseem Chandra: MarcoPolo, A Workspace for AI to Work with Your Data

claim: Agent cannot execute cross-system joins without explicit knowledge of relationships; providing historical queries teaches agent about data relationships
actionable: When introducing agents to multi-database systems, provide examples of successful queries showing relationships before expecting autonomous joins
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Aman Singla & Aseem Chandra: MarcoPolo, A Workspace for AI to Work with Your Data
